title: Lucky Block Reborn
description: A luckyblock mod port into a datapack format! Original, I know.
body:
## Overview
An attempt of a recreation of the original [Lucky Block by player_in_distress](https://github.com/alexsocha/luckyblock). Obviously, this is not the most original idea. I just ended up making this for fun and deciding to upload it to modrinth. Currently contains 39 possible drops every time you break one.

## Compatability
This **SHOULD** work with most mods and datapacks. Nothing needs to be installed on the client for this to function properly but it is recommended regardless.

**Command Blocks must be Enabled** on your server for some features to function.

## Credits
[LLEVC](https://modrinth.com/user/LLEVC) - why am i on my own credits again

[player_in_distress](https://www.curseforge.com/members/player_in_distress) - The Original Creator

## Modpacks/Servers
Give explicit credit if used on any modpacks or servers.
